retrieved_result: Distracted Driving Distracted Driving United States Canada Alabama Texting while driving is prohibited. Drivers aged 16 and drivers age 17 with intermediate licenses for less than 6 months are prohibited from using a handheld communication device while driving. Handheld cell phone use is prohibited in Montgomery. Alas
